name: Nekopirate
author: Poki
description: Avast mateys! Get ready for an adventure on the high seas in Nekopirate, as you slash and dash across a beautiful tropical island. Take on the role of a ferocious pirate captain as you navigate around encounters with different enemies, and collect sushi currency that you can trade in for amazing power-ups and rare items! There are many collectibles for you to find in each level, and you can also revisit previous locations to unlock treasures you might have previously missed. Can you unlock the islands secrets and claim the treasure as your own? How do I play Nekopirate? Move Left: Left Arrow or A Key Move Right: Right Arrow or D Key Jump: Up Arrow or W Key (Press again mid-air to double jump!) Pause: Escape Key Attack / Interact: Spacebar Inventory: Control Key Who created Nekopirate? Nekopirate is created by AJ Ordaz. Play their other games on Poki: A Pretty Odd Bunny , A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast it! , cannon-blast, La Petite Avril , and Lidle Legend ! How can I play Nekopirate for free? You can play Nekopirate for free on Poki. Can I play Nekopirate on mobile devices and desktop? Nekopirate can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
